description: As a geographer conducting an urban expansion study for a metropolitan planning commission, analyze the Landsat multispectral imagery at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1=SWIR1, band_2=NIR, band_3=Red, band_4=Green) in SNAP Desktop. Derive a built-up area index using the SWIR and NIR bands and a vegetation index using the NIR and Red bands. Create a differential urban-vegetation layer and a multi-class urban zoning map categorizing pixels into at least three zones (e.g., dense urban, suburban/mixed, vegetation/open space) using conditional thresholds. Save the analysis product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/analysis.dim and export the zoning assessment as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/zoning_assessment.tif.
